steps.title: Locate the contrast showing personal versus external sources
steps.content: The poem's strongest signal for “based on personal experiences” is the explicit contrast between stories that don't come from books and stories that come “Right out of her own life.”

steps.title: Identify which quotation captures this contrast
steps.content: Choice A directly quotes this contrast: “Never got her stories out of any book at all, / But that they came / Right out of her own life.” The other options focus on storytelling atmosphere, voice, and setting rather than the origin of stories. That matches choice A — A is correct.
